text:
Last Easter I found one.

You say eggs?

I think so.

You find ones? Not!

Just one golden.

You find one? I think not!

I did!

Do yours have berries?

That's mine.

That stuff looks good.

I like cherries.

O mine?

There just wouldn't.

I want yours!


I'd eat mine!

Eat eggs!

You'd like that. I found a big one.

Oh! That would!

I sat on mine.

How's that?

I think great!
